description_long: This muffin features a rich, brown, textured base studded with visible bits of fruit and possibly nuts, giving it a dense and hearty appearance. The top is generously coated with a thick layer of white icing that drips unevenly down the sides, creating a natural, homemade look. At the center of the icing, there is a decorative cluster of three bright red berries and two green holly leaves, reminiscent of a festive Christmas pudding. The surface of the muffin is irregular and slightly lumpy, with the icing providing a smooth contrast to the rougher baked portion. No wrapper is visible, and the muffin sits alone with no supporting surface or plate. The overall impression is of a holiday-themed, fruit-laden muffin with a festive topping.
description: A dense, fruit-studded muffin with white icing dripped over the top and decorated with red berries and green holly leaves. The surface is rough and rustic, with no visible wrapper or plate.
description_view_0: Front view shows the icing and holly berry decoration prominently on top, with the rough, fruit-studded muffin base visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thick, uneven drip of icing and the holly decoration partially visible at the top edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the icing spread more evenly, with less of the holly decoration visible and more of the muffin's rough texture exposed.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the icing dripping down and the holly decoration at an angle, emphasizing the muffin's irregular shape.
